title: ipomoea oligantha
intro: Ipomoea oligantha is a species of flowering plant in the morning glory family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea oligantha include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Ipomoea oligantha can be made into a decoction or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
